app.title: PromptCraft Academy: AI Learning for Kids
app.short_description: Safe AI-powered learning in writing, coding, math & science for ages 6-16.
app.full_description:
PromptCraft Academy is the award-winning educational app that teaches children ages 6–16 how to think creatively, write compellingly, and communicate with AI — skills that will define the next generation.

Six expertly designed learning tracks guide kids from beginner to advanced through interactive challenges powered by a safe, child-filtered AI engine. Every prompt, every response, every badge — built for young minds.

★ SIX LEARNING TRACKS ★

🖊 PROMPT ENGINEERING
Teach kids the most valuable skill of the AI age: how to ask great questions and craft effective prompts. From simple instructions to multi-step creative commands, kids learn to think precisely and communicate clearly.

✍ CREATIVE WRITING
Spark imagination with AI-assisted story starters, character generators, world-building tools, and genre challenges. Kids co-create stories with AI, then make them entirely their own.

💻 CODING FUNDAMENTALS
Logic puzzles, sequence challenges, and beginner programming concepts taught through storytelling. No prior experience needed — just curiosity.

📖 STORYTELLING & NARRATIVE
Learn the craft of great stories: plot structure, character arcs, dialogue, pacing, and voice. Kids read examples, practise techniques, and build a personal story portfolio.

🔢 MATH PROBLEM-SOLVING
Word problems reimagined as adventures. Kids use AI to break down complex problems, check their reasoning, and discover multiple solution paths — building real mathematical thinking.

🔬 SCIENCE EXPLORATION
From hypothesis to conclusion, kids run guided experiments, explore scientific concepts, and ask questions the way real scientists do.

★ PARENT & TEACHER FEATURES ★

• Comprehensive progress dashboard for every child
• Weekly digest emails with highlights, streaks, and achievements
• Classroom Mode: manage up to 30 students from one teacher account
• Curriculum alignment notes for US Common Core and UK National Curriculum
• Content controls: set daily time limits, restrict topics, approve new challenges
• Portfolio export: download your child's work as a beautiful PDF
• Free Premium subscription for verified educators (.edu email required)

★ SAFETY & PRIVACY ★

PromptCraft Academy was built from the ground up with child safety as the top priority:

• Zero advertising — not now, not ever
• No social features, no direct messaging, no public profiles
• All AI outputs pass through a strict child-safety filter before reaching young users
• COPPA compliant (US Children's Online Privacy Protection Act)
• GDPR-K compliant (EU children's data regulations)
• No data sold or shared with any third party
• All data stored securely in SOC 2 certified infrastructure
• Full data deletion available on request at any time

★ WHAT'S INCLUDED FOR FREE ★

The free tier gives every child complete access to one learning track of their choice — no credit card required, no time limit. Explore over 30 challenges and earn your first batch of achievement badges before deciding to upgrade.

★ PREMIUM PLANS ★

• Individual Premium: $4.99/month or $39.99/year
  — Unlock all six learning tracks
  — Offline mode for learning anywhere
  — Priority AI response speed
  — Unlimited portfolio storage

• Family Plan: $9.99/month or $79.99/year
  — Everything in Premium for up to 5 children
  — Shared parent dashboard
  — Sibling challenges and friendly competitions

Subscriptions auto-renew. Cancel anytime in Google Play settings.

★ SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS ★

Requires Android 8.0 or higher. Works on phones and tablets. Optimised for larger screens in landscape mode.
app.release_notes:
Welcome to PromptCraft Academy v1.0!

Launching with:
• Six complete learning tracks (200+ challenges)
• Parent dashboard with weekly progress digests
• Classroom Mode for teachers (free Premium included)
• Achievement system with 50 collectible badges
• Offline mode for Premium subscribers
• Available in English, Spanish, French, German, and Portuguese

We'd love to hear what you think — tap the feedback button in the app or email us at hello@promptcraft.academy
